meta.title: EmbedPress Live Demo
meta.description: Try EmbedPress in your browser — embed YouTube, Vimeo, SoundCloud, Spotify, Dailymotion and more with a single click.
meta.author: WPDeveloper

options.blogdescription: Embed any media in WordPress with one click

steps.data:
EmbedPress Live Demo

These embeds were created with EmbedPress using just a URL — no shortcode syntax to memorize, no iframe markup to write. In the Block Editor, paste any of 250+ supported URLs and EmbedPress builds the embed for you.

YouTube Video

[embedpress]https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ[/embedpress]

Vimeo Video

[embedpress]https://vimeo.com/76979871[/embedpress]

SoundCloud Audio

[embedpress]https://soundcloud.com/itsbadbunny/monaco[/embedpress]

Spotify Episode

[embedpress]https://open.spotify.com/episode/4rOoJ6Egrf8K2IrywzwOMk[/embedpress]

Dailymotion Video

[embedpress]https://www.dailymotion.com/video/x84sh87[/embedpress]

Open the Block Editor (Pages → EmbedPress Live Demo → Edit) to try EmbedPress with your own URLs.

steps.code:
<?php
require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php';
$existing = get_page_by_path('embedpress-live-demo');
if ($existing) { wp_delete_post($existing->ID, true); }
$content = file_get_contents('/tmp/embedpress-demo.html');
$post_id = wp_insert_post([
    'post_title'   => 'EmbedPress Live Demo',
    'post_name'    => 'embedpress-live-demo',
    'post_content' => $content,
    'post_status'  => 'publish',
    'post_type'    => 'page',
]);
update_option('show_on_front', 'page');
update_option('page_on_front', $post_id);
@unlink('/tmp/embedpress-demo.html');
